.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(42, 42, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(54, 54, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(42, 42, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(54, 54, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(31, 31, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a37 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#2a2a37, color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a37 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a37 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#2a2a37, color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a37 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(31, 31, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(31, 31, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(34, 50, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(31, 31, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(34, 50, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(42, 42, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(42, 42, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(54, 54, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(31, 31, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(42, 42, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(126, 156, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(31, 31, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(42, 42, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(42, 42, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(125, 156, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(42, 42, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(42, 42, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
